en.name_en: Painting of Fudō Myōō at Takakura Kōfukuji Temple
en.description_en: Painting of Fudō Myōō at Takakura Kōfukuji Temple is a painting designated as a Tangible Cultural Property. It is municipally designated by Tsurugashima City and was designated on January 23, 1986. It is located at the former Takakura Kōfukuji Temple.

en.description_en: Standing Statue of Eleven-Headed Kannon at Sunaori Shirahige Shrine is a sculpture designated as a Tangible Cultural Property. It is municipally designated by Tsurugashima City and was designated on December 24, 1987. It is located at Sunaori Shirahige Shrine.

Hexagonal Stone Stupa of Kami-Shinden is an archaeological artifact designated as a Tangible Cultural Property. It is municipally designated by Tsurugashima City and was designated on June 27, 1991. It is located at Kami-Shinden.

en.name_en: Ridge Tags and Inscription Plaques of Shirahige Shrine
en.description_en: Ridge Tags and Inscription Plaques of Shirahige Shrine is a historical material designated as a Tangible Cultural Property. It is municipally designated by Tsurugashima City and was designated on February 24, 1994. It is located at Sunaori Shirahige Shrine.

Temple Gong of Zennōji Temple is a craftwork designated as a Tangible Cultural Property. It is municipally designated by Tsurugashima City and was designated on February 24, 1994. It is located at Sunaori Zennōji Temple.

en.name_en: Bronze Mirror with Scattered Maple Crests and Twin Sparrows
en.description_en: Bronze Mirror with Scattered Maple Crests and Twin Sparrows is a craftwork designated as a Tangible Cultural Property. It is municipally designated by Tsurugashima City and was designated on April 26, 2001. It is located at Sunaori Shirahige Shrine.

Road Guidepost of Sunaori Village is a tangible folk-cultural item designated as a Tangible Cultural Property. It is municipally designated by Tsurugashima City and was designated on July 29, 2010.

Takakura Lion Dance is an intangible folk-cultural property. It is municipally designated by Tsurugashima City and was designated on November 1, 1974. It is located at Takakura Hie Shrine.
Sunaori Rainmaking Ritual is an intangible folk-cultural property. It is municipally designated by Tsurugashima City and was designated on August 1, 1976. It is located at Sunaori Shirahige Shrine.
